notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Matt Gage. Tommy Troy to 3rd. Ketel Marte to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
